queryString:
PREFIX social: <http://example.com/theme/social/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?a) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?b { <http://example.com/theme/social/user/3>
              <http://example.com/theme/social/user/4>
              <http://example.com/theme/social/user/5>
              <http://example.com/theme/social/user/6> }
  FILTER(?a != ?b && ?b != ?c && ?c != ?d && ?d != ?a)
  ?a social:follows ?b .
  ?b social:follows ?c .
  ?c social:follows ?d .
  ?d social:follows ?a .
  OPTIONAL { ?b social:name ?optName . BIND(?optName AS ?optAlias) }
  FILTER(?optAlias != "")
}

optimized.irRenderedQuery:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?a) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?c <http://example.com/theme/social/follows> ?d .
  FILTER (?c != ?d)
  ?a <http://example.com/theme/social/follows> ?b .
  FILTER (?a != ?b)
  VALUES ?b { <http://example.com/theme/social/user/3> <http://example.com/theme/social/user/4> <http://example.com/theme/social/user/5> <http://example.com/theme/social/user/6> }
  ?b <http://example.com/theme/social/follows> ?c .
  FILTER (?b != ?c)
  FILTER (?d != ?a)
  ?d <http://example.com/theme/social/follows> ?a .
  ?b <http://example.com/theme/social/name> ?optName .
  BIND(?optName AS ?optAlias)
  FILTER (?optAlias != "")
}

telemetry.irRenderedQuery:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?a) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?c <http://example.com/theme/social/follows> ?d .
  FILTER (?c != ?d)
  ?a <http://example.com/theme/social/follows> ?b .
  FILTER (?a != ?b)
  VALUES ?b { <http://example.com/theme/social/user/3> <http://example.com/theme/social/user/4> <http://example.com/theme/social/user/5> <http://example.com/theme/social/user/6> }
  ?b <http://example.com/theme/social/follows> ?c .
  FILTER (?b != ?c)
  FILTER (?d != ?a)
  ?d <http://example.com/theme/social/follows> ?a .
  ?b <http://example.com/theme/social/name> ?optName .
  BIND(?optName AS ?optAlias)
  FILTER (?optAlias != "")
}
